Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Abusing Customizable Selects 79 upvotes, 3 comments
  2. IRIX 3dfx Voodoo driver and glide2x IRIX port 59 upvotes, 3 comments
  3. Cuba's Fragile Power Grid Finds a Powerful New Partner 30 upvotes, 1 comments
  4. An unsolicited guide to being a researcher [pdf] 182 upvotes, 23 comments
  5. TI-89 Height-Mapped Raycaster 52 upvotes, 4 comments
  6. Ju Ci: The Art of Repairing Porcelain 78 upvotes, 8 comments
  7. Autoresearch on an old research idea 325 upvotes, 71 comments
  8. BIO: The Bao I/O Coprocessor 141 upvotes, 29 comments
  9. A retro terminal music player inspired by Winamp 73 upvotes, 13 comments
  10. Finding all regex matches has always been O(n²) 187 upvotes, 46 comments
  11. Box of Secrets: Discreetly modding an apartment intercom to work with Apple Home 31 upvotes, 4 comments
  12. Sunsetting the Techempower Framework Benchmarks 26 upvotes, 3 comments
  13. Windows 3.1 tiled background .bmp archive 213 upvotes, 62 comments
  14. Pompeii's battle scars linked to an ancient 'machine gun' 57 upvotes, 12 comments
  15. Claude Code Cheat Sheet 283 upvotes, 89 comments
  16. Dune3d: A parametric 3D CAD application 134 upvotes, 39 comments
  17. Show HN: Cq – Stack Overflow for AI coding agents 108 upvotes, 30 comments
  18. Trivy under attack again: Widespread GitHub Actions tag compromise secrets 182 upvotes, 65 comments
  19. Bombadil: Property-based testing for web UIs 237 upvotes, 91 comments
  20. iPhone 17 Pro Demonstrated Running a 400B LLM 546 upvotes, 254 comments
  21. An incoherent Rust 160 upvotes, 73 comments
  22. Gerd Faltings, who proved the Mordell conjecture, wins the Abel Prize 13 upvotes, 2 comments
  23. Local Stack Archived their GitHub repo and requires an account to run 183 upvotes, 101 comments
  24. Epoch confirms GPT5.4 Pro solved a frontier math open problem 217 upvotes, 127 comments
  25. FCC updates covered list to include foreign-made consumer routers 270 upvotes, 174 comments
  26. How I'm Productive with Claude Code 160 upvotes, 100 comments
  27. US and TotalEnergies reach 'nearly $1B' deal to end offshore wind projects 386 upvotes, 297 comments
  28. BIO – The Bao I/O Co-Processor 9 upvotes, 3 comments
  29. I built an AI receptionist for a mechanic shop 245 upvotes, 267 comments
  30. The Resolv hack: How one compromised key printed $23M 78 upvotes, 105 comments

Last generated 2:00pm, 24 March 2026. Source here.
